description: AI chains for contacts + accounts (PG-182/PG-183 follow-up) — wire the remaining AI toggles on both entities to real LLM/embedding consumers: aiEnrichment (external enrichment API + provider adapter, shared across entities), aiTagSuggestions (LLM prompt + surface on detail pages), aiInsightGeneration (LLM chain writing to {Contact,Account}AIInsight + surface), aiAutoReplyDrafting (contact inbox), aiIndustryInference (account-only LLM classifier that picks the best AccountIndustryOption), aiAccountScoring (account-only LLM scorer that writes to the Account score field).

dependencies.notes: PG-182 + PG-183 Completed (attestations present). IFC-310 is a parallel coordination task (Specifying); IFC-312 is the producer of the shared EnrichmentProvider port/adapter — IFC-310 will consume post-landing. See spec §3.3 and plan §9.

execution.executor: Claude Code (Opus 4.7, 1M context) under Ralph loop /full-pipeline IFC-312

blockers.detail: IFC-310 is in Specifying status (started 2026-04-20, parallel). IFC-312 is the producer of the shared EnrichmentProvider port and does not require IFC-310 to be complete before starting. Preflight check flags this as a formal blocker; spec + plan explicitly treat it as a coordination note. Awaiting user decision on whether to remove IFC-310 from Dependencies or waive the preflight check.

status_history.note: Spec + discussion + agent-selection written. 5 agents, 4 rounds condensed. 10 chains + 1 adapter + schema changes + 6 tRPC procedures scoped.
Plan + plan-review-transcript written. Plan-Reviewer APPROVED_WITH_NOTES; 2 errors fixed + 6 notes addressed. suggestTags Option B (BullMQ waitUntilFinished) locked.

Exec did NOT proceed past preflight gates. Per memory rule (feedback_ask_user_on_blockers.md), not unilaterally removing IFC-310 from Dependencies — user input required.

Typecheck green across db, api, ai-worker, adapters, application, domain, web. 2 of 50 files from plan scope complete; 48 remaining.

notes: Very large task (50 files, 21-32 hours PERT expected). Will be executed across multiple Ralph iterations. Spec at .specify/sprints/sprint-19/specifications/IFC-312-spec.md; plan at .specify/sprints/sprint-19/planning/IFC-312-plan.md.
